hero.title: Eyes on Cameroon
hero.subtitle: The bridge between Germany and Cameroon

about.title: Who are we?
about.description: EyesOnCameroon eV is a non-profit association whose main objective is to showcase the diversity of Cameroonian culture in Germany.
about.activities_text: Our activities include theatre, dance, music, fashion shows, literature, culinary tastings, tourist advice, forums, as well as other creative and distinctive features of the country.

offers.title: Our Offers
offers.subtitle: What we provide to our community and partners
offers.cultural_intro: Discover the richness of Cameroonian culture in Germany: our organisation offers you the unique opportunity to explore the traditions, art, music and cuisine of Cameroon.
offers.cultural_text: We regularly organise cultural events, art exhibitions, concerts of traditional and contemporary music, as well as cooking workshops to introduce you to the exotic flavours of Cameroon. Join us for an unforgettable cultural journey and enrich your knowledge of Cameroonian heritage.
offers.social_intro: Solidarity and social exchanges: Our organisation is not limited to cultural discoveries, but is also committed to forging social bonds between the Cameroonian and German communities.
offers.social_text: We organise exchange programmes, social gatherings and volunteering activities to promote intercultural dialogue, mutual understanding and support. Together, we build bridges of friendship and solidarity.
offers.dev_intro: Promoting sustainable development: Commitment to sustainable development in Cameroon is at the heart of our mission.
offers.dev_text: We work with local partners to support projects in the fields of education, health, sustainable agriculture and environmental protection. By participating in our activities, you contribute directly to improving living conditions in Cameroon and promoting equitable development for people and nature.

why.title: Why Eyes on Cameroon?
why.subtitle: The reasons that led us to create this organization
why.reason1_text: It is important to promote the integration of Cameroonians living in Germany and foster international understanding.
why.reason2_text: It is also about helping to build bridges between Germany and Cameroon in order to support non-profit projects with a social and cultural purpose, as well as the development of Cameroon.
why.vision_text: In the long term, EyesOnCameroon aims to become a major actor in promoting Cameroonian diversity, drawing on the recognition of the unique character and identity of our diaspora in Germany.
why.cta_text: Do you share this vision? Contribute to our mission by becoming a member, partner or donor.
